rows.label: qev065202_MSG0003
rows.name:
...You want to know the
passcode? I don't mind telling
you, but on one condition.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0004
rows.name:
Kill that traitor over there and
take me to my daughters. If you do
that, I will politely tell you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_JNK0010
rows.name: Threaten

rows.label: qev065202_SEL0011
rows.name: Threaten her that if she doesn't tell, she'll be the one to die.

rows.label: qev065202_JNK0020
rows.name: Ignore

rows.label: qev065202_SEL0021
rows.name: Ignore Fortun's provocations.

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0005
rows.name:
If you wish to kill me, then
do so. My will has already been
conveyed to my daughters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0006
rows.name:
My existence may disappear, but my
ambitions will never fade. In the end,
I am the one who will be victorious.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Don't mind what Mother says. She's
just trying to drag you into her pace.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Then eventually, I shall have you killed
along with that traitor over there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0009
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]... I have already obtained
all your data. There is nowhere
you can escape to anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0010
rows.name:
Don't mind what Mother says. Without
my sisters' power, she can't do
anything on her own anyway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0011
rows.name:
More importantly... I figured
out what the protection is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0012
rows.name:
It seems Mother's arrogant AI
itself acts as the protection.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0013
rows.name:
In other words, if we erase Mother's
personality, we can obtain the passcode...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0014
rows.name:
Can you truly kill your own mother?
Can you Definians, who lack your
own will, bear losing me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0015
rows.name: I'm not afraid of that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0016
rows.name:
Haha! Stop acting tough! You
Definians need me! If you think
you can do it... then try it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0017
rows.name: Kuh... Ugh... Say, [ST:playername ]? What should I do?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0018
rows.name:
Should I kill Mother? Or should
we look for another way...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_JNK0030
rows.name: Kill

rows.label: qev065202_SEL0031
rows.name: Kill Fortun.

rows.label: qev065202_JNK0040
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev065202_SEL0041
rows.name: Propose looking for another way.

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0019
rows.name:
I see... As I thought... yes...
I understand... I'll do it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0020
rows.name:
...This is surprising. To think a daughter
who escapes my control would emerge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0021
rows.name:
Is the cause her interaction with
Earthlings...? Is this the power
that threatens even the Growth?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Then there is no longer any way
to resist. Take this life with your
own hands, my daughter... Erio.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0023
rows.name:
Mother... It might be strange to
say this like this, but... Thank
you... for everything up until now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0066
rows.name: Ah... Aaaaaaaah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0024
rows.name:
...We got the passcode.
And Mother is gone...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0025
rows.name:
Now, if we defeat the three sisters who
convey Mother's will and lead everyone into
madness, the organization will collapse.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0026
rows.name:
They should possess combat
prowess that someone like me
couldn't even hold a candle to...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0027
rows.name:
Please, be careful. Their stronghold
is on the Black Steel Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0028
rows.name:
But... what do we do? I can't
remove Mother's protection.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0029
rows.name:
If only there was some scientist with
intellect beyond human comprehension...
Is there someone like that in NLA?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0030
rows.name:
Hehe, as expected, Erio
couldn't kill me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0031
rows.name:
The Definians belong to me for all
eternity. Eventually, my daughters
will dispose of you as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0032
rows.name:
There is no way lower lifeforms like
you could ever modify my noble system.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0033
rows.name:
Including that beast over there, I will
kill you all someday, so be prepared.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0034
rows.name:
Hmph! There is no way Emeroa and the
three sisters would ever lose to the
likes of you! Do your best to go and die![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0035
rows.name:
Eh... Emeroa was defeated? Then
my subordinates are already...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0037
rows.name:
...Looking closely, it seems you are
a truly wonderful and noble person, [ST:playername ].
Truthfully, I have respected you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065202_MSG0038
rows.name:
I... want to be of use to someone
like you. If you ever have any trouble,
please tell me anything at all![ST:wait ]
